name: Lashana
bio:
Physical Appearance: Redguard female. Wore a complete set of iron armor, excluding a shield - standard protective equipment for a Fighters Guild knight on a dangerous mission.
Race: Redguard
Personality Keywords: (Unknown - killed before interaction)
Role: Lashana was a knight and member of the Fighters Guild. She joined a mission with Viranus Donton and several other colleagues to deal with trolls in Forsaken Mine, where she met her death.
Location: Lashana's body can be found in the first zone of Forsaken Mine, lying in a pool of blood in the southernmost chamber. She is positioned near a suspicious dead Blackwood Company member.
The Forsaken Mine Mission: Lashana accompanied Viranus Donton and other Fighters Guild members on what should have been a routine troll-hunting contract. The mission went catastrophically wrong, resulting in the deaths of multiple guild members including Lashana.
Circumstances of Death: Lashana lies dead in close proximity to a Blackwood Company member, suggesting the guild members may have been betrayed or ambushed by their supposed rivals rather than killed by trolls alone.
Equipment: Lashana wore a complete iron armor set, though she carried no shield. This suggests she may have favored two-handed weapons or offensive magic over defensive combat styles.
author: Bethesda
